evidence.source_title: Iranian authorities must investigate death of detention centre doctor
evidence.description: Pourandarjani had testified against the Kahrizak apparatus linked to Mortazavi and died under suspicious circumstances days after his testimony; Amnesty called for investigation into his death
Widely believed to have been killed to silence his testimony; his death came after he was threatened by Kahrizak authorities and testified to parliament investigating Mortazavi's operation

editorial_notes: Alleged connection — no criminal conviction linking Mortazavi directly to Pourandarjani's death, but the timing and threats make the connection widely accepted as politically motivated
